if.cond: game_version() >= version(1,2,2) and game_version() < version(1,2,5) and mod_loaded('AGF-BackpackPlus-060Slots') == false and mod_loaded('AGF-BackpackPlus-072Slots') == false and mod_loaded('AGF-BackpackPlus-084Slots') == false and mod_loaded('AGF-BackpackPlus-119Slots') == false

game_version() >= version(1,2,5) and mod_loaded('AGF-BackpackPlus-060Slots') == false and mod_loaded('AGF-BackpackPlus-072Slots') == false and mod_loaded('AGF-BackpackPlus-084Slots') == false and mod_loaded('AGF-BackpackPlus-119Slots') == false

label.name: aglTag
label.tooltip: Meters above ground directly below vehicle

label.name: aglValue
label.tooltip: Meters above ground directly below vehicle
